target: What do you think about Mio, Shinpei?

…W-what do you mean…
Well, I guess…
Of course I care about her.

Hey!
You're annoying me, Tokiko!
Don't ask weird things!

I just got a call from my dad.
After the fireworks and the Umi-okuri ceremony, 
Karikiri's body will be empty!

(It can't be… 
I'm probably just mistaken…)

Won't you come inside the shrine grounds?
You can see the fireworks better from there.
I can't stop thinking about that silhouette

(…It's just my imagination.
She shouldn't be here at all)

(It's probably just… 
the regret of not keeping my promise to Ushio
that's making me see things)

Shin-chan, what's wrong?
You're spacing out.

What's wrong?
You've been silent all this time.

Even though you say it's nothing,
you've been staring at Mio's yukata all this time.

What's with you all of a sudden?!
You're acting weird!

Oh? This is a rare opportunity,
so I figured I'd ask.

Forget that, 
the fireworks will start if we linger.

Y-yeah! 
Let's hurry to the shrine grounds.

…Tokiko.
Is your yukata messed up?
Has your obi come undone?

It's fine.
Even if Shinpei stares at you,
there's no problem.

Oh, there are a lot of people.
They're probably here for the fireworks.

This year's different, I guess.
Look, there.

(On a small stage, 
a girl with a microphone is waving her hands?)

Everyone around us is so energetic.
Their excitement is through the roof.

What are you saying!?
It's not "like" an idol, it's an actual idol!

They brought her from the mainland
for a live performance at the festival.
She's a member of some famous group.

Ugh! Tokiko's so cool.
It's Kaori Koyuba who's coming!

Why is Kaori Koyuba's live performance
on the festival poster?
It's such a big deal!
It's like a secret performance, right?

But there are definitely fans
gathered around here!
Even the locals don't know about it!

If she's that famous, 
there's probably a network of fans chasing her.

( Kaori Koyuba… 
That's the Koyuba from the port, right? )
( Could that Koyuba be an idol? )

( No doubt, that's Koyuba's voice.
…But it's completely different from when I met her at the port )

Wow…
The fans are chanting in unison.

I want to make the festival even more exciting
with my songs!
Everyone, help me out!

Oh, it's okay to take photos!
Let's take one, Shinpei!
Big brother, were you a fan of hers?

No, I'm not a fan,
but since it's a chance, I thought I'd take one.
( Everyone's so focused on their phones… )

Really is.
The flashes from the cameras are intense.
She must be really popular.

Oh, I got it!
It's pretty good.

Wow, she's really cute!
Of course an idol would be dazzling.

This is why
everyone falls for her.

I should delete it.
I don't know what it is,
but there are probably rights involved.

But it's okay to take photos,
so it should be fine.
It might be illegal to post online though.

It's fine!
I don't need it!
Okay, first song! Here we go!

Wow! 
Incredible! It's really her!
Kaori-chan is moving and singing~!!

Haha, what are you saying?
Of course it's real, right?
Oh, the fans are really into it.

( If the Shadow doesn't attack in the open, 
this lively place is safer…
I came here thinking that…)

( This concert being held here 
is even more convenient)

( If I spend the Umi-okuri this way, 
then meet Karikiri after…)

Fireworks in the background during a live performance!
That's amazing!

(No good!
People in a panic are rushing in,
I can't move freely…)

Big brother, where are you!?
People are in the way!!

Shin-chan, where are you!?
I can only hear your voice!

Mio! Tokiko!
If you go against the current, it's dangerous!

Try to go with the current and get out!
We'll meet at the shrine path!

Ah, that's fine!
See you later then!

(Sou's fine for now,
but are Mio and Tokiko okay!?)
(If I fall here, it'll be a problem)

(That's… Kaori!
Because she was on stage, she got left behind!?)

(If she wanted to, she could have escaped first.
But she stayed to help everyone…!)

It's lively, isn't it?
This is fitting for the last day.

(What… is this…
There are people lying around the shrine…)

But if someone hadn't interfered,
I could have done it more easily.
Hey, you there, miss.

You could have just escaped first,
but you sent your fans away first?
Because of you, it's more trouble.
I won't let you interfere anymore.

Oh, can't you see well?
My apologies, take a good look.

(The black shadows on the shrine ground are spreading…
Touching them… )

(People are disappearing…
Like they're being swallowed by the shadows…)
That's right, I told you to let go.

(…No good.
The shadow on the ground has already reached my feet.
If Kaori touches it now…)

(What's happening…?
It's impossible, I can't understand…)

(Yes, Mio…
I have to protect Mio…)
Your right eye… could it be?
